title: Error Taxonomy, Wrapping, Retry Decisions, User Recovery, and Exit · Go Semantics Case: Pokedex Go Session Failure Isolation
summary: Every failure becomes unable to fetch, handlers log and return nil, retries include invalid input, wrapped causes are discarded, and one command failure terminates the session. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go session failure isolation increment in causal recoverable Pokedex error contract. Learners progress through predictio…
objectives: Keep recoverable command failures local, terminate on deliberate quit or unrecoverable lifecycle failure, and always clean up.
Provide concise cause class, safe context, next action, and unchanged-state assurance without leaking URLs or internals.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
